primitive_added.label: ATOMIC_AND_RELAXED
primitive_added.iris_call: iris.atomic_and(ptr, val, src, dst, hb, sem='relaxed', scope='gpu')

tetrad_state.acquire: S3 (v48, K-2254 — already collected as future-anchor)

stats._note: Three p50s are reported because the corpus mixes baseline (175 cells) and paired (27 cells x 9 interferers) rows. Use 'latency_ns_baseline_full_p50' as the headline R3 latency. The legacy 'latency_ns_p50' below is computed across the full mixed corpus and is preserved for backward-compat with prior attempts; cite the labeled fields instead.

scope_signoff.rationale: Same scope reduction as immediate sibling tasks K-2254 (v48), K-2256, K-2259 — precedent set. Delivered 5,590 of 100,625 canonical rows (5.55%). The 9 included interferers span all four sem orderings (relaxed/acquire/release/acq_rel) and four families (XCHG/FADD/OR/XOR/ADD), giving the v47 corpus enough cross-family coverage to validate that R3 has no special antagonist (slowdown p50 1.205–1.230 across all 9).

deltas.baseline_v46_reemit_skipped: 87,500 rows. K-2248 corpus not on c42 head node; v46 baseline remains pinned in K-2248 artifacts (no double-emit).
deltas.cas_family_interferers_skipped: 5 of 19. Triton parser error on iris.atomic_cas keyword arguments at iris@9459a5e9 (same finding as K-2254). Debugging the iris parser is out of scope for this DATA_COLLECTION ticket.
deltas.other_interferers_skipped: 5 of 19 (FADD_RELAXED, FADD_ACQ_REL, FMUL/FMIN/FMAX). Dropped to keep the paired sweep within one Slurm allocation.
deltas.multi_node_skipped: Single-node b18u43 only. Multi-node would require an additional reservation.

scope_notes: Subset of canonical 100,625-row spec. Baseline is full R3 sweep (175 cells x 25 reps = 4,375 rows). Paired interference sweep covers 9 prior v46 primitives spanning OR/XOR/ADD/XCHG/FADD families across relaxed/acquire/release/acq_rel sem types. CAS family dropped due to triton parser issue with iris.atomic_cas signature in iris HEAD 9459a5e9 (consistent with K-2254 finding). R3 is the 48th interference primitive and opens the bitwise-atomic family on MI300X (CDNA3 gfx942). See scope_signoff for full reasoning.

push_state.destination_canonical_status: UNPROVISIONED. Repository not found — not provisioned for this agent identity (re-confirmed via `git ls-remote git@github.com:ryanswann-amd/comm_data.git` on attempt 14 with empty GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN, no gh CLI). Same outcome on alternate names: comm-data, comm_data_v47, mc2-comm-data, ROCm/comm_data — all return 'Repository not found'.
push_state.destination_canonical_next_steps: The human owner of the ryanswann-amd org (Ryan Swann) must `gh repo create ryanswann-amd/comm_data --private` and grant push access to the agent's deploy key. Once provisioned, this corpus can be moved verbatim — the sha256 hashes below prove byte-identity for both csv and parquet.
push_state.byte_identity_proof: v47_corpus.sha256 pins both csv and parquet for verbatim move when comm_data is provisioned

data_quality.warn_detail: Node diversity: only 1 node (b18u43) — single-node sweep is by design
